name: Ginger-Soy Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a small bowl.
2. Use the marinade to marinate meat, fish, or chicken for an hour or overnight, turning to coat from time to time.
3. The remaining marinade may be used to baste meat while it is cooking.
Makes 3/4 cup = 6 servings.
Food Exchange per serving: FREE; CAL: 46; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 6g; PRO: 1g;
SOD: 202mg; FAT: 0g.
